sound_type: silence / echolocation (inaudible) -- NBHF clicks at >120 kHz, far above human hearing. No audible vocalizations. No whistles. No social sounds humans can hear. E=1 NEW ABSOLUTE MINIMUM.
ecosystem: Inland sea, bays, estuaries, shallow coastal waters. Resident in Salish Sea year-round.
season: Year-round resident. Does not migrate. Recolonizing southern Puget Sound since 2000s.

coordinates.description: Harbor Porpoise in Salish Sea / San Juan Islands. Shallow coastal waters. Shy, elusive, year-round resident.

taxonomy_note.description: Second Phocoenidae (after Dall's Porpoise 186). E=1 NEW ABSOLUTE MINIMUM. Silence as sound strategy. NBHF echolocation above human AND orca hearing. No whistles. No audible social sounds. Behavioral crypsis.
taxonomy_note.name_etymology: Phocoena from Greek 'phokaina' (porpoise). 'Harbor Porpoise' for its preference for harbors, bays, sheltered waters.
taxonomy_note.genus_note: Phocoena -- 4 species worldwide. Harbor Porpoise is the most widespread.
taxonomy_note.order_note: Cetacea. Second cetacean in SPS (after Dall's Porpoise 186).
taxonomy_note.family_position: Second Phocoenidae. Eighth consecutive marine mammal (180-187). Approaching Picidae nonet record.
taxonomy_note.class_note: Class Mammalia. Marine mammal era: 8 consecutive (180-187). 4 families.

song_metrics.song_frequency_hz: N/A (no audible vocalization or social sound).
song_metrics.song_duration_s: Click trains: continuous during echolocation. No audible duration to measure.
song_metrics.note_structure: NBHF clicks only (ultrasonic, inaudible). NO whistles. NO audible social sounds.
song_metrics.note_types: Echolocation clicks only (NBHF, >120 kHz). All other sound types absent.
song_metrics.phrase_structure: Click trains during navigation/hunting. No social sound phrases.
song_metrics.amplitude: E=1. NEW ABSOLUTE MINIMUM. No audible sound to measure. The floor.
song_metrics.tempo: Click trains: rapid, continuous. No audible tempo to measure.
song_metrics.context: Shallow coastal waters. Brief surfacings. Avoids boats. Rarely breaches.
song_metrics.regional_variation: Minor click frequency variation documented between populations.
song_metrics.key_property: SILENCE. E=1 NEW ABSOLUTE MINIMUM. NBHF >120 kHz. No whistles. No audible sounds. Stealth. v1.49.328.

pelage.overall: Dark gray back, lighter gray flanks, white belly. Small, robust body. No distinctive markings. Triangular dorsal fin.
pelage.diagnostic_mark: Small size (1.4-1.9 m). Dark gray back. Triangular dorsal fin. Brief rolling surfacing. No visible splash or spray.
pelage.swimming_pattern: Brief rolling surfacing to breathe. No breaching. No bow-riding. No visible splash. Dives 30-90 seconds, 50-100 meters.

physical_description.overall: Length: 1.4-1.9 m. Weight: 45-70 kg. Robust, compact body. Blunt head. No beak. Small triangular dorsal fin. Spade-shaped teeth.
physical_description.diagnostic_mark: Small, dark gray, no beak. Brief surfacing. Virtually no splash. Triangular dorsal fin. Very difficult to observe.
physical_description.field_id: Small gray cetacean with brief, rolling surfacing. No splash, no bow-riding, no breaching. Avoid looking for them -- they find you, or more likely, you never see them at all.

nodes.title: E=1 -- New Absolute Minimum
nodes.description: Below previous E=2 (degrees 119, 144). No audible vocalization. No audible behavior. The quietest entry in the engine. Signal exists (echolocation active) but entirely beyond human perception.

nodes.title: Silence as Sound Strategy
nodes.description: NBHF above orca hearing. No whistles (evolved loss). ALL audible sound eliminated from repertoire. Anti-predator adaptation. Silence = survival. Social cost: limited communication options.

nodes.title: Hidden Cetacean -- Present but Unseen
nodes.description: 10-15K in WA inland waters. Year-round. Small, shy, avoids boats. Recolonizing Puget Sound. Most people never see one despite daily presence.

nodes.title: Widest Energy Gap -- E=7 + E=1 = 6 Points
nodes.description: Degree 187: Stas THEE Boss activist (E=7) + Harbor Porpoise (E=1). 6-point gap. Widest in engine history. What cannot be heard by most.

cross_references.relationship: PHOCOENIDAE PAIR! Dall's (E=5, rooster tail, speed) vs Harbor (E=1, silence, stealth). Same family, opposite strategies.
CONTRAST! Dolphin (E=5, vocal, acrobatic) vs porpoise (E=1, silent, cryptic). Maximum contrast in consecutive degrees.
WIDEST ENERGY GAP EVER! E=7 + E=1 = 6-point gap. Activist truths in unheard frequencies + ultrasonic echolocation. What cannot be heard by most.
RECORD BROKEN! E=1 drops below previous absolute minimum of E=2 (degrees 119, 144). New floor established.
